title: Eusteralis quaternifolia
uses: Eusteralis quaternifolia has been found to have potential medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Its leaves and bark are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's extracts have been studied for their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its therapeutic effects. In some parts of the world, Eusteralis quaternifolia is used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. Further research is necessary to fully understand the plant's medicinal uses and potential applications.

The leaves and bark of the plant are often used to treat different ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In some traditional practices, the leaves are used to treat wounds and reduce inflammation.
